steps.title: Translate volume to weight
steps.content: The boulder weighs $160$ pounds per cubic foot, so total weight equals $160$ times volume.

steps.title: Multiply the volume bounds
steps.content: The volume satisfies $$14.6\lt V\lt18.6$$ Multiplying all parts by positive $160$ preserves the inequality direction: $$160(14.6)\lt x\lt160(18.6)$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The correct answer matches this inequality, so C is correct.
